accurate.why: All factual claims align with the bill text; CRA authority, DOL rule title, and Federal Register citation are correct.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies disapproval of the DOL rule under the Congressional Review Act.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the rule would have no force or effect, accurately capturing the legal consequence.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in this resolution.

effective_dates.why: No separate effective date is specified beyond enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the sole operative provision of the resolution accurately.

concise.why: Appropriately brief for the resolution's simple content.

correct_entities.why: Department of Labor and rule title correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: Fed. Reg. citation and date are correct.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
